name: MaxKB
description: Open-source enterprise RAG platform for building AI agents. Upload docs, auto-vectorize, and orchestrate multi-step workflows with MCP tool-use and a visual workflow engine.

skills.name: Document Ingestion
skills.description: Upload documents or crawl web pages and automatically split, vectorize, and index content for retrieval.

skills.name: RAG Query
skills.description: Query a knowledge base with natural language and receive grounded answers with cited source references.

skills.name: Workflow Orchestration
skills.description: Build multi-step AI agent workflows with a visual engine, MCP tool-use, and custom function library nodes.

skills.name: REST API Access
skills.description: Integrate MaxKB knowledge bases and agents into external applications via a documented REST API.
